name: Tru Knowledge Bank
description: TRU institutional memory — verified facts and system state

entries.fact: COIL_UNBOUND pipeline is fully operational — 7 artifacts confirmed complete, 164,548 total chunks on server, TASK005 fixed and verified
COIL_SYNC Protocol: chunk_size 5120 bytes, format guARanteed CONTIGUOUS by design — no more header/hash table confusion
tru-core v0.2.0 runs as supervised process — heartbeat every 60s, error log watcher active, mirror daemon watcher active
TASK005 (COIL_MASTER_CHIP) was rebuilt from Dog (34MB physical disk bytes, sha256: fdd96ba35f47e71e4af2e9d6eaa4e4c69d8a7e1a1648ff3c6d4e4e8d1648ff3c6d) — format fixed to guARanteed CONTIGUOUS
Redline encryption was used for CYCLE23 — later deemed unnecessary for this deployment, plaintext sync confirmed working
Git repo: github.com/splashdown1/coil-system — latest push: a019e36 to main — workspace is clean
Tru Knowledge Bank created on 2026-05-04 as institutional memory for TRU — bridges tru-core operational memory with zo.space UI
LOGOS verification layer requires: internal coherence check, external consistency against known facts, specificity threshold ≥3 content words
Anomaly cleared: TASK005 hash mismatch — root cause was wrong header format (4sH32sHH) vs server expected (4sH4s32sHH) — fixed by patching generator to use correct gap bytes
Anomaly cleared: COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json kept growing — root cause was in-place manifest JSON append during chunk processing, solved by using write() after full read
